_meta.status_note: TENCENT80/TOYOTA80/ASML01 verified 2026-07-14 against primary sources (SET IM, KTB, Bualuang). 005930.KS (Samsung) has no confirmed SET-listed DR — SAMSUNG80.BK does not exist on Yahoo Finance; needs either a real ticker or removal from seed_list.json.

alternatives.verified_note: Ratio 1:100 confirmed via SET Information Memorandum (issuer KTB, 'General Document Number 7'); ticker/issuer confirmed on set.or.th company-profile. Reviewed 2026-07-14.
